div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 209px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-setup
Install deps into isolated venv
Configure MLflow tracking URI
Verify API keys (Anthropic/Vertex)
Preflight environment checks

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 209px; margin-left: 257px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-analyze
Deep-read skill + sub-skills (LLM agent)
Explore dataset schema and test cases
Generate eval.yaml (judges, models, thresholds)
Cache analysis in eval.md

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 209px; margin-left: 517px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-dataset
Bootstrap, expand, or extract from traces
Generate realistic test cases matching schema
Cover simple, complex, and edge scenarios
Validate cases against eval.yaml schema

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 209px; margin-left: 777px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-run
Prepare isolated workspace per case
Execute skill headlessly (case or batch)
Collect artifacts and score with judges
Generate HTML report with analysis

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 59px; margin-left: 1022px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-review
Present judge scores per case
Collect human qualitative feedback
Analyze transcript execution paths
Propose targeted SKILL.md edits

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 229px; margin-left: 1022px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-optimize
Identify failures from judge rationale
Analyze root causes via transcripts (LLM)
Edit SKILL.md with surgical fixes
Re-run and check for regressions

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 399px; margin-left: 1022px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-mlflow
Sync dataset to MLflow registry
Log params, metrics, and artifacts
Push judge + human feedback to traces
Pull MLflow UI annotations back
